mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(a.initial_balance), 0) + COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(e.debit, 0) - COALESCE(e.credit, 0)) FROM entry e INNER JOIN account a2 ON a2.id = e.account_id AND e.account_type = 'account' INNER JOIN transaction t ON t.id = e.transaction_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a2.user_id = #{userId} AND a2.is_deleted = 0 AND a2.include_in_net_worth = 1 AND t.date < #{startDate} ), 0) AS last_month_net_worth FROM account a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.include_in_net_worth = 1

SELECT c.id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, c.icon AS categoryIcon, COALESCE(SUM(e.debit), 0) AS totalExpense, COUNT(t.id) AS txCount FROM transaction t INNER JOIN entry e ON e.transaction_id = t.id AND e.account_type = 'category' INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = e.account_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.type = 'expense' AND t.date >= #{startDate} AND t.date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.icon ORDER BY totalExpense DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT c.name AS name, c.icon AS icon, c.type AS type FROM entry e INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = e.account_id WHERE e.transaction_id = #{transactionId} AND e.account_type = 'category' LIMIT 1
